free_text: Light particle and complex fragments emission from
12C induced reactions on 58N, 64Ni at E/A=46.2 MeV
The Heavy Ion Research Facility of
Self-supporting thin foils of the targets 64Ni, 58Ni,
197Au and 209Bi with more than 1 mg/cm2 in thickness,
12C with a few hundred mug/cm2 in thickness.
The dE detector was silicon surface barrier detector,
